welcome.title: Welcome to GameStringer!
welcome.description: Your assistant for translating video games
welcome.content: The all-in-one app to translate your favorite games into any language. This wizard will guide you through the initial setup.

emptyStates.noActivityDesc: Your recent actions will appear here. Start by exploring the library or creating a translation.

rss.title: RSS Feed

guidePage.title: Guide
gameLibraryFeatures: Automatic scan for Steam, Epic, GOG, Origin, Ubisoft, Battle.net
Filter by name, engine, supported language, genre
Game details: engine detection, localization files, DLC
Translation recommendations based on engine and available files
neuralTranslatorFeatures: AI translation with Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepL
Supports JSON, PO, RESX, CSV, XLIFF, Unity YAML, Unreal Locres
Cost and time estimation before starting
ocrTranslatorFeatures: Capture text directly from game screen
Global hotkey: Ctrl+Shift+T for quick capture
Smart cache to avoid duplicate translations
ueTranslatorFeatures: .locres file extraction from Unreal Engine 4/5 games
In-memory translation without modifying original files
unityPatcherFeatures: Modes: Capture only, Google Translate, DeepL
In-game hotkey: ALT+T for XUnity menu
telltalePatcherFeatures: Translations for Telltale games (Wolf Among Us, Walking Dead, Batman)
Specific instructions for GOG version (batch script)
Direct link to Italian translations download
multiLlmCompareFeatures: Compare translations from multiple AI providers
Side-by-side comparison: OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek, Mistral, DeepL
customGlossaryDetails: Categories: Names, Items, Abilities, Locations, UI, Lore
Empty term = do not translate (e.g. proper names)
translationHistoryDetails: Statistics: words, API cost, time, provider
Filter by tool, provider, game, date
Cache hit rate to optimize costs
autoDetectLanguageDetails: Character support: Latin, Asian, Cyrillic, Arabic
Integrated in OCR and Neural Translator
voiceTranslatorNewDetails: Record or upload audio for translation
multiLlmCompareNewDetails: Side-by-side: OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek, Mistral, DeepL, Libre
uiLanguageSelectorDetails: Coming soon: Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Chinese
Custom flag icons for each language
voiceCloneGuideFeatures: AI voice cloning with ElevenLabs and OpenAI TTS
Upload audio samples to create custom voice clones
Voice presets: narrator, hero, villain, child, robot, elderly
Adjustable stability, speed, and similarity settings
vrOverlayGuideFeatures: Automatic VR headset detection (Oculus, SteamVR, WMR)
Position presets: bottom center, top center, peripheral, wrist
Customizable style: font size, opacity, shadow
playerFeedbackGuideFeatures: Collect and manage player translation feedback
Categories: accuracy, fluency, context, terminology, style
Status tracking: pending, reviewed, applied, rejected
Export feedback as JSON or CSV
qualityBadgeGuideFeatures: Quality score 0-100 for each translated row
Content type badge: UI, Dialogue, Narrative, System, Tutorial
Real-time quality preview during batch translation
Detail results table with up to 200 rows
rtlSupportGuideFeatures: Automatic text direction detection for RTL languages
Support for Arabic, Hebrew, and other right-to-left languages
Dir attribute dynamically applied to document
ollamaGenericGuideFeatures: Use any locally installed Ollama model
Chain presets with automatic fallback between providers

disclaimer.title: Terms of Use
disclaimer.subtitle: Read before continuing
disclaimer.mainDisclaimerText: The developer is not responsible for translations, patches or modifications created with this software.
disclaimer.useAtOwnRiskText: You use this software at your own risk. Always backup before modifying game files.
disclaimer.intellectualPropertyText: Games and trademarks belong to their respective owners. GameStringer is not affiliated with any publisher.
disclaimer.translationQualityText: Automatic translations may contain errors or inaccuracies.
disclaimer.noWarrantyText: Software provided "as is", without warranties of any kind.
disclaimer.communityServerText: GameStringer connects to an external server for Community Hub features: sharing translations, downloading packs, user profiles and interaction with other users. Your profile data and shared translations are transmitted and stored on remote servers. Do not share copyrighted content or sensitive personal information.
disclaimer.dataPrivacyText: Local data (game library, translations, settings) stays on your PC. Only content you choose to share via the Community Hub is sent to the server. AI provider API keys (OpenAI, DeepL, etc.) are stored locally and are never transmitted to our servers.
disclaimer.aiServicesText: When using cloud AI providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepL, Lingva), texts to translate are sent to the respective third-party services according to their policies. For maximum privacy, use Ollama for fully local translation.
disclaimer.summary: By continuing, you accept these terms and are responsible for your use of the software.

tutorial.pressSpace: Press Space to continue • Esc to skip

welcome.title: Welcome to GameStringer!
welcome.description: Professional software for translating video games into any language.

aiFeatures.title: Advanced AI Translation
aiFeatures.description: Use Ollama for free locally, or OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepL and Lingva. Multi-step AI Pipeline for maximum quality.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Complete overview with statistics, recent activity and quick access.

library.title: Game Library
library.description: All your games from Steam, Epic, GOG and other stores. Filter by language or engine.

translator.title: AI Translator
translator.description: Translate files with AI. Supports JSON, CSV, PO, RESX and many other formats.

patcher.title: Patcher Engine
patcher.description: Automatic patches for Unity (BepInEx + XUnity), Unreal Engine, Godot, RPG Maker and Ren'Py.

advancedTools.title: Advanced Tools
advancedTools.description: Unity CSV Translator for Mono and IL2CPP, OCR Multi-Engine (4 engines), Batch and Offline translation with Ollama.

community.title: Community
community.description: Download translation packs from the community or share your own.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure APIs, connect stores, manage profiles and customize the app.

complete.title: All Set!
complete.description: Explore the library or start translating your first game right away!

v1_8_2.0: Fix Ollama IPC: replaced all check_ollama_status IPC calls with direct HTTP to localhost:11434 — eliminated ipc.localhost ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED errors
v1_8_2.1: Fix Stores: added Stores link in sidebar Resources section
v1_8_2.2: Fix Epic Connect: Epic Games from broken OAuth to credential modal (like GOG/Origin)
v1_8_2.3: Fix Test Connection: testConnection uses real Tauri commands instead of simulated API
v1_8_2.4: Fix Disconnect: added Epic/Steam credential deletion in Tauri backend on disconnect
v1_8_2.5: Fix Presence: added session guard in updatePresence to prevent 400 Bad Request on update_user_presence
v1_8_2.6: i18n: Store → Stores in Italian translations

v1_8_1.0: Fix CSP: added 'unsafe-eval' for Next.js dev mode compatibility
v1_8_1.1: Fix CSP: permissive CSP in development, restrictive in production
v1_8_1.2: Fix CSP: added http://ipc.localhost for Tauri IPC
v1_8_1.3: Fix i18n: corrected offlineTranslator.* keys in Ollama dashboard widget
v1_8_1.4: Fix Rust warnings: removed unused_mut and dead_code in 9 backend files
v1_8_1.5: Middleware: dynamic CSP based on NODE_ENV

v1_8_0.0: Live Translation Overlay: real-time translation via transparent OCR overlay on top of any game — screen capture → multi-engine OCR → AI translation (Groq/Cerebras) → gaming-style overlay. Hotkey Ctrl+Alt+O
v1_8_0.1: Hub Marketplace: marketplace for sharing community translation packs — 1-click install, rating, reviews, moderation, user profiles with reputation. Supabase backend with 10 tables + RLS
v1_8_0.2: Translation Memory Network: federated translation memory network — translators contribute to global pool (opt-in, privacy-first). Next user finds strings already translated. Auto-integrated in translation pipeline
v1_8_0.3: AI Dubbing Pipeline: 7-step pipeline for automatic dubbing — scan audio → Whisper STT → AI translation → TTS voice synthesis with voice matching → duration matching → audio file patching → Rhubarb lip sync → subtitle generation SRT/VTT/ASS
v1_8_0.4: Plugin System: PatcherPlugin interface for community-created patchers — detect/extract/patch/verify/restore lifecycle. Template generator for plugin scaffold. No Rust compilation needed
v1_8_0.5: Security: hardened CSP (removed unsafe-eval), XSS eliminated, AES-256-GCM encrypted API key storage, CSRF protection, Zod validation, global rate limiting
v1_8_0.6: Architecture: CI pipeline with tsc+eslint+vitest+npm audit, 71 new tests, 18 modules extracted from monolithic files, 1197/1203 console.* migrated to structured logger, 893 catch clauses typed
v1_8_0.7: Refactoring: ai-translate-direct.ts (-429 lines, 5 modules), game-detail-client.tsx (-636 lines, 8 components), translator/pro/page.tsx (-776 lines, 5 components)
v1_8_0.8: Dependencies: removed duplicate react-hot-toast and vdf, -42 packages

v1_7_0.0: Auto-Select Engine (🧠): new 'Auto' preset that dynamically selects the best AI providers per target language and game genre — based on real benchmarks (DeepL for European, Claude for CJK, RPG/Adventure genre boost)
v1_7_0.1: Quality History: per-session provider quality tracking per language, automatic chain reordering based on successes/failures
v1_7_0.2: Gridly CSV Export/Import: multi-language format compatible with Gridly/Lokalise/Crowdin (ID | source | target per language), auto-detect delimiter and language columns
v1_7_0.3: Duration Matching: voice synthesis with automatic speed adaptation to maintain original audio duration — two-pass TTS with Web Audio API measurement
v1_7_0.4: Rhubarb Lip Sync: lip-sync data generation (visemes A-X) from audio with interactive visual timeline, export for Unity (blend shapes) and Unreal (FaceFX)
v1_7_0.5: Video Extractor: direct link from game card + game picker from library + auto-scan
v1_7_0.6: Lip Sync Page: new /lip-sync page with full panel (recognizer, timeline, stats, multi-engine export)
v1_7_0.7: Sidebar: added Lip Sync entry in Tools section

v1_6_1.0: CI/CD: merge job to unify latest.json from all platforms (Windows/Linux/macOS)
v1_6_1.1: CI/CD: guard step that fails the build if signing doesn't produce valid minisign signatures
v1_6_1.2: CI/CD: 'Locate latest.json' step to immediately detect if tauri-action doesn't generate the updater manifest
v1_6_1.3: Auto-update: rotated minisign signing key (pubkey B61C7704C9F3B554) — old key never signed anything in CI
v1_6_1.4: Docs: added RELEASE_PROCESS.md with complete procedure (signer, secrets, verification, rollback)
v1_6_1.5: Removed orphaned latest.json from repo root (placeholder with empty signatures)

v1_6_0.0: Bethesda Engine Patcher: Skyrim LE/SE/AE, Fallout 3/NV/4, Oblivion, Starfield with BSA v103-105 + BA2 GNRL/DX10 + ESP/ESM (FULL/DESC/NAM1) parser
v1_6_0.1: CRI Middleware Patcher: CPK + CRILAYLA + MSG/BMD/FTD parser (Persona 5 Royal, Yakuza, Tales of, Dragon Ball) with Shift-JIS/UTF-8/UTF-16 detection
v1_6_0.2: Unity Localization Package pipeline: StringTable, SharedTableData, Addressables catalog, Smart Strings tokenizer + validator
v1_6_0.3: Universal PO export (gettext .po) for all patchers with project/language/source/engine metadata
v1_6_0.4: Shared Wizard Stepper for multi-step flows in patchers
v1_6_0.5: a11y: aria-label on icon buttons, CardTitle semantic headings, focus-visible on primitives, skip-to-content link, landmark main, sr-only Italian
v1_6_0.6: a11y: prefers-reduced-motion and forced-colors (Windows High Contrast) respected
v1_6_0.7: Design system: Card variants via cva (default/muted/highlight/success/error/warning), Button size xs + icon-sm
v1_6_0.8: OCR Image Processor: wiring to Tauri Tesseract backend (replaces stub simulateOCR)
v1_6_0.9: Text utilities: text-micro (9px) + text-2xs (10px) to eliminate arbitrary Tailwind classes
v1_6_0.10: Fix: prevent console flash loop on Windows process spawn when app is in tray (helper process_util::no_window_command)

v1_5_0.0: Community Chat Realtime: real-time chat integrated in Community Hub with Supabase Realtime
v1_5_0.1: 4 predefined rooms: General, Translations, Feedback & Bugs, Announcements
v1_5_0.2: Auto-bridge: automatic Supabase login via GameStringer profile (no additional login)
v1_5_0.3: Online presence: real-time connected users indicator with Supabase Presence
v1_5_0.4: Custom room creation for specific games or projects
v1_5_0.6: Chat widget in bottom-right with expandable drawer
v1_5_0.7: Supabase backend: PostgreSQL, RLS policies, auto-profile trigger, RPC functions
v1_5_0.8: i18n: chat translations in all 11 supported languages (IT, EN, ES, FR, DE, JA, ZH, KO, PT, RU, PL)
v1_5_0.10: User guides updated in 11 languages with Community Chat section
v1_5_0.11: Unified Supabase client (eliminated Multiple GoTrueClient warnings)

v1_4_2.12: Fix: Ollama provider cooldown instead of permanent block for network errors

v1_4_1.0: i18n: complete UI in 11 languages (IT, EN, ES, FR, DE, JA, ZH, KO, PT, RU, PL)
v1_4_1.1: Added KO (Korean), PT (Portuguese), RU (Russian), PL (Polish) translations to translations.ts

v1_4_0.0: Unified Radix UI: migrated 37 files from @radix-ui/react-* to radix-ui, removed 27 packages
v1_4_0.1: Quality Badge in Pro Translator: per-line quality score with ContentTypeBadge and QualityScoreBadge
v1_4_0.2: Live Quality Preview: real-time quality preview during batch translation

v1_4_0.5: Generic Ollama: translateWithOllamaGeneric with PROVIDER_MAP and chain fallback presets
v1_4_0.6: Bundle Optimization: optimizePackageImports updated with radix-ui, framer-motion, recharts, cmdk
v1_4_0.7: TypeScript cleanup: 0 TS errors in sources, fixes in 8 files (translation-quality, validator, notifications, tutorial)
v1_4_0.8: Fix: regex match type casting in translation-quality.ts and translation-validator.ts
v1_4_0.9: Fix: NotificationToastProps with missing optional props

v1_3_0.0: Danganronpa WAD Patcher v15: All-Ice base + GameStringer override (35,865 strings)
v1_3_0.1: WAD Text Extractor CLI: complete text extraction from WAD for translation
v1_3_0.2: WAD Extractor UI: new tab in Danganronpa Patcher with editor and batch AI translation

unityInkTranslator.title: Unity Ink Translator
unityInkTranslator.subtitle: Translate Unity games with Ink stories — extract, translate, inject
unityInkTranslator.translationError: Translation error. Check that Ollama is running.
unityInkTranslator.step2: Extract Ink strings (dialogues) from assets files
